---
applyTo: "docs/**"
---

# Documentation instructions

Only these categories are allowed under `/docs`:
- tutorials, how-to, reference, explanation, adrs, runbooks

Do not create new top-level folders under `/docs`.
Do not place evidence or verification outputs in `/docs`. Use `/artifacts`.

ADRs use enterprise namespace `VE-PLAT-ADR-NNNN` and must be registered in `docs/reference/decision-index.yaml`.

See `docs/reference/doc-governance.md` for full rules.
